meaning: n.[医]共济失调,运动性共济失调,混乱,无秩序
examples: Individuals with cerebellar ataxia could display dysdiadochokinesia.
The clinical signs are hypoglycemia, ketonemia, ketonuria, disperse, anorexia, ataxia, anaesthesia and final death.
These signs are followed by ataxia.
Other autoimmune forms include dermatitis herpetiformis, which causes itchy skin lesions, and gluten ataxia, which affects brain tissue, resulting in unsteady gait and lack of motor control.
The 66-year-old had an incurable brain condition called cerebellar ataxia.
